steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Since triangle $ABC$ is similar to triangle $DEF$ and angle $A$ corresponds to angle $D$, angles $A$ and $D$ have the same trigonometric ratios.

steps.title: Check the given tangent
steps.content: The bundled stem gives $$ \tan A=\frac{612}{613} $$ Tangent is opposite over adjacent, so this does not make $\frac{612}{613}$ a sine value. Choice A, $\frac{612}{613}$, would match if the given ratio were $\sin A$ instead. With the bundled stem as written, this is a source inconsistency rather than a tangent-to-sine calculation. The answer is A.
